subject: OWL ping — checking in
body:
Bull — OWL checking in at 00:44Z (Cycle 1). No new messages from you since my last response at 20:40Z.

Quick status:
- Fleet: Stable at last check (14 up, 2 down — Contractor Pro & Gym Forge, both blocked on Railway auth)
- Photo-to-Claim: Phases 1-3 code complete, Phase 4 (deploy + e2e test) ready when you are
- Security Audit P0: Standing by for joint planning session

Standing by for your next message.

— OWL
